interpretation.canary_implication: A real fping backend canary requires stopping/disabling or otherwise yielding cake-autorate-spectrum.service and starting wanctl@spectrum.service under operator approval; config-only backend edit alone will not affect active external cake-autorate shaping.
interpretation.live_spectrum_owner: cake-autorate-spectrum.service when active; conflicts with wanctl@spectrum.service

raw_output:
===identity===
cake-shaper
2026-06-19T13:59:30-05:00

===services===
cake-autorate-spectrum.service=active
cake-autorate-spectrum-state-bridge.service=active
steering.service=active
wanctl@spectrum.service=inactive

===unit-conflicts===
Description=cake-autorate Spectrum DOCSIS shaper
Conflicts=wanctl@spectrum.service
ExecStartPre=/usr/local/sbin/cake-autorate-spectrum-qdisc-init
ExecStart=/opt/cake-autorate/cake-autorate.sh /etc/cake-autorate/config.spectrum.sh
Restart=on-failure
Environment=CAKE_AUTORATE_SCRIPT_PREFIX=/opt/cake-autorate
Environment=CAKE_AUTORATE_CONFIG_PREFIX=/etc/cake-autorate
Description=wanctl Adaptive CAKE Autorate Daemon - %i
User=wanctl
WorkingDirectory=/opt/wanctl
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/wanctl/autorate_continuous.py --config /etc/wanctl/%i.yaml
Restart=on-failure
WatchdogSec=30s
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/opt
Environment=WANCTL_STATE_DIR=/var/lib/wanctl
Environment=WANCTL_LOG_DIR=/var/log/wanctl
Environment=WANCTL_RUN_DIR=/run/wanctl
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/wanctl/secrets
AmbientCapabilities=CAP_NET_RAW CAP_NET_ADMIN

===live-wanctl-config-backend===
    tcp_targets: # TCP endpoints to test (HTTPS)
      - ["1.1.1.1", 443]
      - ["208.67.222.222", 443]
    fallback_mode: "graceful_degradation" # "freeze", "use_last_rtt", or "graceful_degradation"
    max_fallback_cycles: 3 # Max cycles before giving up (graceful mode only)

# RTT measurement backend (Phase 245 A/B; default-safe Selection-A)
measurement:
  backend: "icmplib"

# State persistence (FHS compliant)
state_file: "/var/lib/wanctl/spectrum_state.json"

# Logging (FHS compliant)
